response.justification: Ten-plus years of full-stack development with direct expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and current focus on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks align precisely with the role's core requirements. Consistent track record delivering at scale—millions of mails, top-10 apps, high-throughput microservices—demonstrates the proven capability and ownership the role demands. Minor gaps in specific frameworks are addressable given foundational mastery.
strengths: Direct mastery of primary stack with 10+ years full-stack experience spanning backend, frontend, and infrastructure
Current role demonstrates AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development—exactly aligned with stated requirements
Proven delivery at scale with measurable business impact and strong testing and architecture discipline
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js and testing background
PostgreSQL not listed among database skills; Kotlin and Java experience limited
Authentication, authorization, and security practices not highlighted despite role requirement

key_factors.factor: Primary stack expertise and AI-agent focus
Proven seniority and delivery at scale
